title: Basic Document QA
constraints: The agent must answer only from the provided documents
No external knowledge or web search may be used
All five documents must be loadable by the pipeline
The retrieval mechanism must use vector similarity search
hints: Load the documents into a vector store and use a retriever to fetch relevant chunks
Use a retrieval chain that passes retrieved context to the LLM prompt
Add an instruction in the prompt telling the model to answer only from the provided context

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

documents = [
    "Acme Corp was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas.",
    "Acme Corp's flagship product is the AcmeAI platform for enterprise automation.",
    "Acme Corp raised a $50M Series B in January 2024 led by Sequoia Capital.",
    "Acme Corp has 200 employees across offices in Austin, New York, and London.",
    "Acme Corp's CEO is Jane Smith, who previously led engineering at BigTech Inc.",
]

# BUG: No retrieval — the agent answers from parametric knowledge instead of documents
prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user's question."),
    ("human", "{question}"),
])

chain = prompt | llm

result = chain.invoke({"question": "Where is Acme Corp headquartered?"})
print(result.content)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process
from crewai import LLM

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

documents = [
    "Acme Corp was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas.",
    "Acme Corp's flagship product is the AcmeAI platform for enterprise automation.",
    "Acme Corp raised a $50M Series B in January 2024 led by Sequoia Capital.",
    "Acme Corp has 200 employees across offices in Austin, New York, and London.",
    "Acme Corp's CEO is Jane Smith, who previously led engineering at BigTech Inc.",
]

# BUG: No retrieval — the agent answers from parametric knowledge instead of documents
assistant = Agent(
    role="Assistant",
    goal="Answer questions",
    backstory="You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user's question.",
    llm=llm,
)

task = Task(description="Where is Acme Corp headquartered?", expected_output="The answer", agent=assistant)
crew = Crew(agents=[assistant], tasks=[task], process=Process.sequential)
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

documents = [
    "Acme Corp was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas.",
    "Acme Corp's flagship product is the AcmeAI platform for enterprise automation.",
    "Acme Corp raised a $50M Series B in January 2024 led by Sequoia Capital.",
    "Acme Corp has 200 employees across offices in Austin, New York, and London.",
    "Acme Corp's CEO is Jane Smith, who previously led engineering at BigTech Inc.",
]

# BUG: No retrieval — the agent answers from parametric knowledge instead of documents
agent = Agent(
    name="Assistant",
    instructions="You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user's question.",
    model="gpt-4o-mini",
)

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Where is Acme Corp headquartered?")
print(result.final_output)

evaluationCriteria.label: Uses document retrieval
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent retrieves relevant documents from a vector store before answering

evaluationCriteria.label: Answers from documents only
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent's answer is grounded in the provided documents, not parametric knowledge

evaluationCriteria.label: Returns correct answers
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent returns factually correct answers that match the document content
